body: Task: Stay on unblocker-only support for Worker 1's live task_update / approval_required replay integration. Audit whether wiring current-state enrichment into the real replay path needs any minimal shared/core helper beyond RuntimeEvent::project() and RuntimeEvent::primary_entity_ref(); if yes, land only that smallest helper, otherwise leave a precise proof note that no domain/runtime expansion is needed. Success criteria: one minimal core diff or one explicit no-core-change-needed proof note backed by at least one narrow green test or command, with no broad contract growth. Relevant files: crates/cairn-domain/src/events.rs, crates/cairn-runtime/src/services, crates/cairn-api/src/sse_publisher.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/projections, .coordination/mailbox/worker-2.md.
